mapper.sql: a.id, a.employee_id, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, a.work_date, a.check_in, a.check_out, a.work_hours, a.overtime_hours, a.status, a.memo, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM erp_attendance a LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id
AND a.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid
AND a.work_date >= #{fromDate}::date
AND a.work_date <= #{toDate}::date
AND a.status = #{status}
ORDER BY a.work_date DESC, e.employee_no ASC
SELECT FROM erp_attendance a LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}::uuid

SELECT FROM erp_attendance a LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON a.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE a.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid AND a.work_date = #{workDate}::date LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_attendance (id, employee_id, work_date, check_in, check_out, work_hours, overtime_hours, status, memo, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{employeeId}::uuid, #{workDate}::date, #{checkIn}, #{checkOut}, #{workHours}, #{overtimeHours}, #{status}, #{memo}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_attendance SET check_in = #{checkIn}, check_out = #{checkOut}, work_hours = #{workHours}, overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours}, status = #{status}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
